1: Pure creative force is available; the art is to use it with timing and endurance, not by forcing or burning out.
2: Receptive strength carries and supports; balance openness with discernment so you stay grounded in what is yours.
3: Beginnings are tangled; clarity comes from patience and sorting things in order rather than from one bold leap.
4: A learning phase; growth favors honest teaching and humility over cleverness or pretending you already know.
5: Waiting until conditions ripen; the usual mistake is rushing, not lack of ability—readiness matters as much as desire.
6: Opposition and blockage; a good outcome often means knowing when to yield or pause, not only how to win.
7: Shared purpose and discipline; strength in the group needs both clear leadership and humane aims.
8: Alliance around sincerity; loyalty works when it is mutual and chosen, not merely demanded.
9: Small accumulations and gentle restraint; progress is real but partial—let it deepen before expecting a full break.
10: Walking near danger; tact and attention buy safety. Confidence belongs after care, not before.
11: Harmony when forces align; flow is favorable and still asks you to stay aware as conditions shift.
12: Closure and mismatch; inner truth and integrity matter more than pushing for outer advance right now.
13: Fellowship in the open; unity is possible—keep sincerity in the group without mistaking numbers for clarity.
14: Great holdings and responsibility; abundance brings both opportunity and the need for proportion.
15: Modesty steadies the situation; true humility helps, while false humility or self-erasure does not.
16: Enthusiasm that can gather people; channel the energy so it serves something lasting beyond the first high.
17: Following the time; adapt to what is moving while keeping your own sense of direction.
18: Repairing what has spoiled; healing is possible and asks honest work, not denial of the rot.
19: Approach and growth; the classical text also names a later season—enjoy the rise and stay awake to turns ahead.
20: Looking and being seen; let what is visible rest on real substance, not only on image.
21: Justice and decisive clarity; penalties and cuts need fairness and measure, not only force.
22: Grace and form; beauty can clarify or distract—let appearance serve the deeper thing.
23: Stripping away; support erodes—conserve what matters and avoid acting as if conditions were still full.
24: Return of light in small form; first stirrings of renewal deserve patience, not premature claims of full recovery.
25: Natural correctness and spontaneity; stay honest without carelessness or blaming “fate” for avoidable harm.
26: Gathering strength and learning; store and study until action is timely, without hoarding insight forever.
27: Nourishment in every sense; what you feed—body, speech, attention—builds health or harm.
28: Heavy load on the structure; reduce strain where you can, or cross with clear awareness of the sag.
29: Danger repeated; sincerity and steadiness help you move through risk—they do not erase the need for care.
30: Clarity and what gives light; brightness illuminates and also needs wise holding so it does not blind or burn.
31: Influence and mutual attraction; bonds form best with care and truth, not only with impulse.
32: Duration and continuity; lasting habit supports you—watch that it does not harden into mere rigidity.
33: Retreat as strategy; yielding at the right time can save what insistence would cost.
34: Great strength is present; use force within measure and law, not only as raw push.
35: Advance and visibility; rise with substance and notice envy or haste as natural companions of the climb.
36: Light wounded or hidden; perseverance is often quiet and protective rather than bright and loud.
37: The household; roles and loyalties at close range—order here is intimate and worth clear care.
38: Opposition and distance; trust can be small and local; good faith in small matters still counts.
39: Obstruction and slow going; some directions help and some do not—outside help may matter.
40: Release after tension; ease opens, and old patterns can return—freedom and vigilance can go together.
41: Decrease and simplicity; loss and restraint can still pair with sincerity and a kind of success.
42: Increase and growth; more is possible—share gains and watch for overextension or inflated ego.
43: Breakthrough and open declaration; truth spoken plainly may meet resistance—choose timing and tone with care.
44: Sudden encounter; notice what pulls you and whether commitment here fits the larger pattern.
45: Gathering together; assembly can unify purpose or scatter anxiety—keep the center in view.
46: Rising by degrees; growth depends on season, help, and steady steps rather than skipped rungs.
47: Oppression and strain; when ease is scarce, endurance and integrity are themselves a form of success.
48: The well as common source; maintain what everyone draws from, and use the depth fairly.
49: Revolution—real change of substance; renewal needs timing and trust, not only surface motion.
50: The cauldron—transformation of what is cooked; refine inner substance, not only outer show.
51: Shock that awakens; alarm can reorder life—let it move you toward real adjustment, not only fear.
52: Stillness and center; rest deeply without turning stillness into permanent avoidance.
53: Gradual development; advance step by step—the image is serious commitment, not decoration.
54: The marrying maiden; misalignment and second place; undertakings that do not truly fit need honesty or change.
55: Peak fullness and clarity at noon; height brings visibility and the reminder that light also turns.
56: The wanderer—travel and the margin; small means and careful conduct can still hold dignity.
57: Gentle penetration; subtle influence over time—persistence without nagging or hidden pressure.
58: Joy and open exchange; conversation and pleasure connect people—depth still matters alongside ease.
59: Dispersion—things loosen; blocks can clear, and scattered focus is the risk to watch for.
60: Limitation and measure; boundaries protect and can gall if too tight—seek workable rhythm.
61: Inner truth at center; sincerity opens doors—pair it with discernment about where trust belongs.
62: Small excess; modest scope fits this pattern—large gestures are not what the moment favors.
63: After completion; order is achieved and still fragile—attention at the end matters as much as the start.
64: Before completion; almost across invites care—finish steadily so small hurry does not spoil the crossing.
